creator: petef@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks!  I made some changes: 

* updated to version 3.0.1 (this was trivial) 
* replaced some patches with regexps in the Makefile 
* cleaned up your patch to Makefile.in and named it patch-Makefile.in 
* made pkg-{comment,descr} a bit more readable 
* better config file management 

I didn't set adrian@freebsd.org as the maintainer, I set it to ports@.  If 
you would like to be the maintainer, please get back to me.  Thanks!
